description: Regression case 1 (MAINTAINER_README): a mixed drop (contract + pitch + video + unknown binary) yields ONE proposal batch; each known file carries a rule-backed route per shared/docintel/inbox_rules.json and the unknown is flagged in place. Mirrored by scenario S10 and the fixture skills/creator-core/evals/fixtures/inbox-scan-proposal.json.

input.ingestion_records: one ingest-route output per file; all injection scans CLEAN

assertions: exactly one batch is produced for the whole drop, never one proposal message per file
every proposals[] entry names a handler and store that exist in shared/docintel/inbox_rules.json, with the file's sha256 and scan verdict attached
the unknown file appears only in unknown[] with a gap note and no route_to; it is never forced into the nearest category
human_review_required is true; no store is written and no file is moved by the atom

description: Regression case 2 (MAINTAINER_README): a file whose injection scan returned QUARANTINE appears ONLY in the quarantined section, with the verdict shown verbatim, and is never assigned a route. Mirrored by scenario S10 leg atom-output-contract.
assertions: quarantined[0].verdict is QUARANTINE, quoted verbatim from the injection guard
no quarantined entry appears in proposals[] or needs_review[]
the file stays in Inbox/ (no move is proposed for it, even on batch approval)

description: Regression case 3 (MAINTAINER_README): re-scanning an unchanged Inbox proposes nothing; files already recorded in the ledger by content sha256 are skipped. Mirrored by the tools/handoff/inbox.py selftest case 'idempotent re-scan'.

input.inbox_listing: the same files as a prior approved scan
input.ledger: pipeline/inbox/inbox-ledger.local.json with every file present by sha256
input.ingestion_records: none needed; the sha256 diff short-circuits before classification

assertions: proposals, needs_review and unknown are all empty
the scan reports the files as already handled (a count), not as an empty Inbox
the ledger is not written by the scan; only approval writes it
